details.reason: Spec 11 omits Phase 4-local adapter.call_request.v1, adapter.call_response.v1, adapter.call_result.v1 and adapter.missing_capability_blocker.v1 because the build plan keeps them out of the Phase 2 Kernel contract registry.

Owner manifests now expose the Phase 19 owner-domain actions for artifact-tree hardening, database-analysis evidence, semantic-release mutation, batch/reingest and multi-source merge; Phase 4 therefore treats supported happy paths as owner-backed and reserves typed blockers for incomplete request context or unproven mutation targets.
